patterns.label: Auth Middleware Pattern
patterns.description: Centralized JWT verification with error propagation through shared error types

patterns.extractedFrom: ECL entry #089 — Sara's auth middleware refactor, 3x verified, 0 failures

patterns.label: Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern
patterns.description: Idempotent webhook processing with event deduplication and ordered handling

patterns.extractedFrom: ECL entry #112 — Sara's Stripe handler, 2x verified, 0 failures

patterns.label: Shared Validation Pattern
patterns.description: Runtime validation through packages/validation with domain-specific validators per ADR-007
patterns.author: sara-chen-acme

patterns.label: Service Route Handler Pattern
patterns.description: Route handlers validate input at boundary, use shared error types, and delegate to service layer
patterns.author: sara-chen-acme
patterns.extractedFrom: ECL entry #095 — Consistent route handler pattern, 4x verified

patterns.label: Retry with Backoff Pattern
